nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 39, with temperatures rising to around 41 overnight. South southeast wind around 2 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 65. South southeast wind 2 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and 11pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 50, with temperatures rising to around 54 overnight. South southeast wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 69. South southwest wind 14 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.shortForecast: Rain Showers Likely then Slight Chance Light Snow
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before midnight, then a slight chance of rain between midnight and 3am, then a slight chance of snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 31. West northwest wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday
